content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be restructured around a hierarchical 'agent-of-agents' memory gate, where micro-agent submodules compete for memory storage allocation based on their intrinsic curiosity signal, rather than relying on fixed task-driven prioritization rules. This framework redefines the core agent as a dynamic curator of its own memory rather than just a task-executing decision-maker.
